title: A wide implementation effort as a FIXED DAG · 6 construction lanes · the planner reassigns lane contents but can never grow the graph.

beats.name: cold-boot
beats.caption: the fixed graph wires up · 6 lanes mounted · extra work parks in unassigned_work

beats.name: quiet
beats.caption: a no-change replay · every node memo-skips · cost flat, the report fingerprint is stable

beats.name: lane-local
beats.caption: IP03 · only skill-contract guidance changed · ONE lane lights, five lanes stay dark

beats.name: quiet-2
beats.caption: back to a flat memo-skip field · the changed lane settled

beats.name: foundation-fanout
beats.caption: IP02 · the shared shape moves to Receipt@v2 · ALL SIX lanes wake once (intentional fanout)

beats.name: review-blocks
beats.caption: IP04 · a lane patches a forbidden path · construction-review REJECTS · integration excludes it

beats.name: quiet-final
beats.caption: the bookend · no-change replay · the whole fixed graph memo-skips at zero fresh
